budget._comment_bench_priority_order: Order drives which bench personas run when budget cap is exceeded. Junior Eng is always-invokable on code-diff outside this system (D-12). Rationale: security covers broadest attack surface; compliance narrower (citable controls); dual-deploy critical for enterprise/air-gap customers; performance > finops because hot-path findings are actionable vs budget-oriented; air-gap niche (self-hosted only); test-lead broader scope but less critical; executive-sponsor + competing-team-lead are weak-signal, correctly last.
